title: Phoenix Wright: The Thing
description:
"We're going to take some of everybody's blood... cause we're going to find out who's the Thing..."

Phoenix and others are stuck on North Pole station, trying to find out who's the monstrous Thing before everyone gets infected! 

This is a tribute to one of the best sci-fi horror movies ever made, I've put a lot effort in it, I hope you like it as much as I do ^^

Special thanks to www.court-records.net for basic sprites and all my faithful subscribers! And thanks for any constructive feedback, it will help a lot in future videos!
